park_name: BIG4 Mackay Blacks Beach Holiday Park

reviews.review_text: We stayed in tent .very nice right near beach. Very clean.

Amazing stay at Black Speech Caravan Park. The location is one of the best on the East Coast, with clean amenities and spacious sites. The owners are fantastic….. so welcoming and friendly. Loved the happy atmosphere with kids laughing and families enjoying themselves. Would definitely stay again
Excellent experience

Love Black's Beach! A true gem.
We stayed in our camper trailer. Clean toilets and bathrooms. Nice pool, nice water play area. Clean BBQs. Its a small park so we did find there was limited fridge space, but that was manageable. You really can't beat being right on the beach!!!! Just check out the photos!!!

We had such a relaxing stay at BIG4 Mackay Blacks Beach Holiday Park. The location right by the beach is beautiful and the whole park is very clean and well maintained. Our family loved it. Such a calm, easy atmosphere that made it really enjoyable.

The staff were wonderful and kindly allowed us a later checkout, which we really appreciated and made the end of our stay much less rushed.

We’d happily stay here again and highly recommend it to families visiting Mackay!

I had such a lovely stay here. The location is honestly amazing, right in front of the beach with beautiful ocean views. Waking up and seeing the sea every day never gets old.

What really makes this place special though are the managers. You can tell they genuinely care about the park and believe in what they’re building. They work so hard to keep everything clean and running smoothly, and they’re always friendly and up for a chat. It makes a big difference when the people managing a place actually put their heart into it.

The pool is a great bonus, especially on hot days, and overall the park feels very well looked after.

It’s just a really nice, relaxed place to stay. You feel welcome straight away. I’d definitely come back and would recommend it to anyone passing through.
Clean amenities and camp kitchen, nice staff and great location
Sehr ordentlich und sauber. Schön am Strand gelegen. Viele Fledermäuse in den Bäumen 🦇🦇🦇.
Fabulous location, but maintenance is not a high priority at all!

Beautiful spot right on the beach
Clean and well kept
Ample facilities and lovely pool
Great location and a well run, clean and tidy caravan park.  Staff are friendly and experienced.  A beautiful vista from the beach end overlooking nearby islands.
Cabins were clean beds comfy grt location right near the beach
Very small and tidy. On the beach and well shaded.

We had a cabin, and the rest of the family were in their camper. We got put nicely close together. Beautiful location right on the beach. Would be 5 stars if it wasnt for the stench of rotting fish from the bins. Many of the campers were fishing, and you cant blame the site if some campers spoil it

Stayed on a powered site, both going north, and on our return.
Good park and amenities.
Nice park
Had a great time there, great location, clean amenities and kitchen, and Andrew is lovely ! We had a great time chatting with him. Will definitely come back!

Cannot speak highly enough of the owners and the park facilities. They squeezed us in last minute and saved us from having to stay at Central Tourist Park (do not stay there). The owners were so nice they helped us out by decreasing the charge for the night after learning that we were not refunded for the park previously named. The location is outstanding and you are immediately greeted with a lovely atmosphere. Amenities and pool absolutely perfect 👌 thank you so much ☺️

Right on the beach in a quiet residential area. Very good fishing off the beach (when they're on the bite), good sized sites, very good sealed roadways. Good water pressure, TV signal, mobile reception. Amenities adequate & clean until they're not, great rain shower heads. Welcoming reception. Only gripe is occasional cohorts with kids who race around the roadways in the evening on bikes, scooters etc in very poor light - parents don't care - one day an oldie will be seriously injured. Park needs to enforce barring of this activity at night. Highly recommended.
Amazing location so beautiful
Great location, we were fortunate enough to have a beach front site. Would return if we're in that area in the future
Lovely spot on the beach.  Great shower & bathroom facilities with pool & large camp kitchen.  Will visit again.
Brilliant location right on beach- great views- close to shops- nice beaches to walk on- pool ok and facilities ok- would definitely stay again
Great park but wouldn’t get a cabin again as very pricey but definitely a park to stay at if in Mackay.

Great location. Room very expensive. Light hanging out of ceiling. Told desk about it. Quite rude, lady said "yeh we know about it" or words to that effect. Sliding door kept getting the stuck closed, very hard to open.

We had a lovey 6 days and nights at Blacks Beach. Our site was lovely and flat, a drive through site, we even had a glimpse of the ocean from our van door. The staff at check in were lovely and very helpful. The ground staff were also very pleasant and helpful. We only had a very short walk to the most beautiful clean beach. The amenities were extremely clean. We didn’t use the lovely BBQ area or the pool but they looked clean. The park generally was very quiet even though most nights it appeared full.
It’s our second visit to this park and once again we were not disappointed .Excellent check in clean amenities and well maintained areas our only disappointment was we thought we were there longer 😂
Great little gem of a park. Straight onto beach.
Wifi non existent, no key to lock front screen door to allow fresh air, front door curtains see through no privacy   Overall disappointing
Lovely quiet park on the beach..Shopping centre about 4kms ..Quite a long way from Mackay cbd..
Great caravan park with excellent clean amenities. Beach very close and easy walking along flat beach. Highly recommend.

Beautiful spot on a lovely beach.
The only thing that annoyed us is that they packed in the caravans in the drive-through bays.
Always a great spot to spend time walking on the beach, fishing and just relaxing. Magic location
Had a great short stay, our cabin was magnificent, was a treat to stay there, location so close to the beach, great experience.
Stayed 5 nights in our caravan, site was superb, managed to get a beachfront site. Staff very helpful. Amenities were clean and well maintained.

Nice caravan park right adjacent to the beach with access steps.  Could do with another amenities block as there is only one.  Decent pool with shade sails and splash park for the kids. Camp kitchen was well kitted out including tv.  Lots of birds throughout the park, possums at night and a goanna that l saw a few times sunning himself outside the amenities area.  Wifi was not great not sure where you need to be to get any good access to it. Pet free park so no barking  dogs.
Best night sleep, loved my morning beach walk, great family cabin tysm 😊
Excellent service and nice staff 👍

Our stay at Blacks Beach Caravan Park was really good. Not only does this park have a great layout it is also very well maintained. After finding out we were staying on our site the maintenance man made sure he blew the dust off the concrete pad so it was nice. The ladies in the office made sure we had the site of our choice and that worked out really well. The amenities block is well looked after and cleaned regularly, and that shows. The pool is a ripper and the splash pool for kids is a big hit also. Finally and the best, I asked if my sons family (wife and two sons 11 and 9 years old) could come over to visit, of course they said aslong as they are well behaved.
And the pool
Nice quiet holiday park with great shower and toilet facilities and it's right on the beach for an amazing sunset/ sunrise views.
Beautiful clean facilities, with the beach right next to park. The managers are so lovely. We forgot our towels and lent us one. Would go back anyday.

Amazing place and also amazing host. Two Italian friends and me (Peruvian) stayed at the caravan park for one night. The location was just next to the beach and the facilities were amazing.
The host an Australian fellow was very kind and friendly. I highly recommend this place

It was a busy period over Easter with lots of families around, but the best part was the location right on the beach, which made it easier to go for walks. Friendly owners and other guests were very helpful.  Stayed here before in the cabins. Showers and toilets pretty clean.
The location and park was lovely. It was a shame that the service was so disappointing.
To recommend... When good weather.

Top camping, met geweldige receptie/managers!

Groetjes 🇳🇱
Jillian on reception would have to be the most unfriendly rude person I’ve come across in a caravan park. I will not be returning.

Kleine maar fijne camping direct aan het strand met een super uitzicht. Faciliteiten zijn verouderd maar zijn redelijk schoon en werken allemaal goed. Wij raden deze plek aan voor minstens 2 nachten op doorreis.
Je kan er goed vissen vanaf het strand.

Siamo arrivati alle 6 di domenica e la reception era chiusa ma i titolari sono stati gentilissimi ad aspettarci. Il camping è molto bello e tenuto bene ma sopratutto è davanti alla spiaggia ! Bellissimo per vedere l’alba. E poi il titolare è stato super gentile lasciandoci tantissimi consigli per il road trip ! Altamente consigliato !

Stayed here camping with the fam in January 2025. Such a beautiful spot so we extended our stay longer than planned. Kids had a ball in the pool, friendly service and clean amenities we will visit again one day.

Good park close to the beach. The amenities were clean but not the best we’ve seen. The radio in the amenities was nice, though! Beach is good for fishing but not swimming. Ice creams at the reception were overpriced. We had a great view of the red moon from our site.
Love this caravan park, not too large, great amenities and fabulous location right by Black's Beach
Such a great place right on the beach, great for the kids to run around and just be kids , good pool area.  BBQs and outdoor kitchens
Nice to visit a friendly environment.
Nice place to visit and stay in a relaxing environment.

Disappointing Stay with Unfriendly Staff

We stayed at this caravan park for a few days, and while the grounds were nice, our experience was ruined by several issues with the staff.
When we first arrived, we were placed near a neighbor who watered their garden over the fence, soaking our entire tent.

The real problem started in the shared kitchen. As we carefully stored our food in a bag with our name on it. One morning, we found our bag outside the fridge after the staff had finished “cleaning.” The food was warm, and we had to throw it all away, which was quite costly for us. When we asked the staff why it was removed, they claimed not to know. We asked if they could check the cameras, as we were certain it was someone from the staff, but the lady in the office was dismissive, claiming the cameras didn’t work and insisting the staff wouldn’t do such a thing.

To make matters worse, the same neighbor watered their garden again, soaking our tent. We went to the office to ask for help, and the same rude lady was there. She was already annoyed when we approached, and when we explained the situation, she told us it wasn’t her problem and that she couldn’t speak to the neighbor because she couldn’t leave the office. There were three other staff members present, but none of them offered to help or show any concern.

Overall, the lack of customer service and the rude attitude of the staff really soured our experience. We’ve stayed at caravan parks for the past 4 months and never encountered such unfriendly staff. Very disappointing.

Stayed for 3 weeks had an issue when we left told me I'd only paid for 6 and not 7 days when I specifically said another week. No apology or anything it was like pay up not very people friendly the owners. On the upside the pool was nice. Little pricey for powered sites and tje prices double in the holidays

A lovely man at the reception. He was really welcoming and friendly. We felt more like friends than customers.
The kitchens are clean and you have everything you need. The toilets are also good and clean. You have direct access to the beach from the campground and the view is spectacular. It's wonderful to watch the sunset and relax a bit.
Very nice showers and toilets,  good location
Snuck in to use the pool, had a wonderful time. Kids really enjoyed it, plenty to do and good location. Can't comment on rooms or service as I wasn't making use of them...
Very hard to get your caravan into the space, all reverse in and very tight. Location is very nice.
Thank you for the park and service. I love it !
Wonderful stay, just loved it, we will be back.

Lovely park right on the beach. Fishing & swimming at the beach as well as a great pool. Lovely clean amenities.
Located a couple of minutes drive from shops, 20mins to centre of Mackay.
Great park close to town, excellent amenities and friendly staff.

We has a beach front site and the views from the back of the van were outstanding. This is one of our favourite caravan parks that we return to each year. We just open our back doors and we're amazed at the views.
Andrew and Fiona make you most welcome. Photo from our van. WOW

This was the third stay for my wife and I at BIG4 Mackay Blacks Beach Holiday Park.  We have returned to this park because it is a very pleasant caravan park.  It is small, and the sites are compact but it is in a good location.  This stay we managed to get a beachfront site.  It was very long, so we had plenty of room to park our car in front of the caravan.  The site has fake grass which is getting tired and worn.|The beachfront site allowed us to walk straight out the back onto the beach.  The downside of the location was the on shore winds!|The park is about 1 minutes drive from shops etc, so it is necessary to drive to stock up.  There are however, plenty of options within reasonable driving distance.||Overall we give BIG4 Mackay Blacks Beach Holiday Park, 4 stars out of 5
Great spot right on the beack. Quiet and relaxing.
On the beach.  Hotel close. Place is looking tired. Every thing was clean and tidy, staff very helpful and friendly.

Amazing location so close to beach! Kids enjoyed fishing, ping pong and pool!
The tavern was great for dinner also.

What a fabulous 2 days at this lovely park!
Ocean view site with an amazing sunrise.
Amenities are super clean and the staff very friendly and helpful.
Definitely worth a stay.

One of the best parks I have ever stayed. Loved waking up to the sunrise over the water each day. Great sites, not too many but not a small park. Amenities were fantastic. Location was also easy to get to.
Amazing setting, lovely clean amenities and friendly service.

Nice caravan park with all the normal amenities.

Nice smaller splash park and great pool. Park backs onto a great beach to wander up and down.

Located in a quiet part of town a short 15 or 20 minute drive back into Mackay.

We had a great site down towards the back of the park, however I would have been disappointed if we booked one of the drive through sites, as they are stacked in, no way of opening an awning, or perhaps even a window!

Biggest negative for us, the groundskeeper team move wheelie bins around the park between 7am and 7:30am every morning, but hay, if they are up and about, i guess everyone should be!

"A Gem with Amazing Beach Access", checkout the beach access and park photos. A great park with 8 sites backing onto the beach and direct beach access, good BBQ and great Pool and a small water play park for kids.
Toilet blocks were very clean and tidy pro ably less than 5 years old.
Nice park on the beach
It was one of the nicest camps I have stayed in.
Schöner Standort direkt am Strand. Wir waren 2 Nächte dort und hatten bestes Strandwetter. Amenities sind voll in Ordnung.

Great campsite, friendly staff.
Very nice spots, very good amenities.
Close to the beach as you can get.
Nice place
Loved this place as a stopover on our camper van holiday
Awesome place, friendly people
This is a great family park . Great staff, super clean and well maintained.  Highly recommend.

Black beach big 4 is a lovely park we stayed there last night in our van in a drive through park. The staff were lovely with a small awesome water play area for the little kids and a lovely o for the bigger kids. Amenities were clean and well kept. And meters from our van we could could straihht into the beach. We def be back when travelling through

Great location right on the beach! Plenty of showers and toilets for size of park. Amenities could be better maintained. If using laundry, need to mind your clothes and any bags left there while wash on as one of ours was taken (you can get that anywhere I suppose but this is just what happened to us here).
Great CP, Friendly helpful staff. Nice facilities. Clean amenaties
Very clean park directly on the beach. Good friendly service. Amazing pool. This is a smaller caravan park which is nice.

This is a smaller Park. In as much as there are fewer site, however the sites are spacious and they come with a slab or a green mat. The amenities are kept clean. We occupied site B6, being beach front. This is to the right of the front and it's the end one so more room at the awning side and uninterrupted views of the Beach ⛱️, this spot, if you can get it is the best! The park rates are reasonable for the location. It is situated about 10kms north of Makay. There is a shopping complex about 3kms away where you will find Woolworths and coles amongs other retailers. We spent two weeks here and could have stayed longer. The beach walks are awesome.
We had two cabins and it was comfy,nice to listen to the ocean at night,lots of sites.We did enjoy our stay there
Camped in rooftop tent here for 2 nights. Very well maintained and clean. Modern showers and toilets. Pool was a bonus. Great sunrise and walks on pristine beach. Would recommend staying here. 👍

Sept ,Unfortunately blew a gale this time we were there! We were on site 5 no slab but a mat.However sand ,dirt leaves flying around was exacerbated by an idiot who thought a leaf blower directed our way was a smart idea.This park seems to attract the leaf blower brigade, Have seen five going at the same time!

Very nice and well maintained park. We booked last minute 1.5 week ago, but very promptly and pleasantly provided with a drive through site that we preferred for just the 2 nights we intended to stay. We stayed in this caravan park many, many moons ago and were pleased that it is still a great place to stay. Amenities were clean and tidy, sites were a nice size for such a busy part of the coast. The direct beach access is great and offers beautiful sunrises and opportunity for long walks. Nice park for families too, but the park was really nice and peaceful at night time nevertheless. Nice room for kids and adults to find entertainment or watch TV. We explored the area on our bikes a bit, no hills to navigate so an easy ride.
Eimeo Pub is a very short drive away and can be recommended for its amazing view whilst enjoying a coffee or a meal, the venue itself could do with bit of TLC.
The park's amenities were very clean and well maintained. Highly recommend.

In all our travels we were blown away with this little piece of the world🤩 what a gem 👍 we had booked in for a couple of days and just kept extending our stay😜 to start with the managers and staff are amazing, super friendly and welcoming 🥰 the amenities were spotless and park and beach front will blow you away 👍 I always read other people’s reviews and everyone is entitled to their opinion and looking at nearly every review you will see this place is one of the best however there was one that said something about flying foxes which I would like to inform you all there was none there over our stay 😉 so basically loved the place that much I’m bringing my family back for Christmas 🤶 Thankyou for your hospitality 🥰❤️
Next to a long nice beach. Bath rooms are very clean. There are many large trees in the park, producing a very relax and enjoyable  environment.
Great location and excellent amenities.

Excellent park. We scored a beachfront site for the night and it was actually beachfront! Amenities were clean and tidy, caravan sites were a nice size plenty of room for van and car we didn’t feel squeezed in. Beach is fantastic great sunsets and you just have to get up for the sunrise it was amazing. Nice beach walk and plenty of room for kids to play if you need. Not really near any shops but there was a tavern not too far away. Mackay is fairly spread out so shops and food is only a few minutes drive. This park was great I wish we could of stayed longer. Highly recommend.

Excellent campsite. Welcoming staff. Location is amazing and if you can go for a beach front site it will not disappoint. Pool and water splash area great for kids and me! Camp kitchen facilities were fab. Not too squashed. Would definitely return and wish we had stayed longer.
It’s just a couple of steps to the pristine Black Beach from our powered site.

We kwamen te laat aan op de camping. Receptie was al gesloten. Eigenaar heeft ons super fijn geholpen. De dag erna was alles mogelijkben niets was te gek. Nog korting gekregen op decal betaalde rekening. Camping zelf is niet super groot of luxe. Maar het strand (het vissen) en de super service en gastvrijheid maakt dit tot een positief resultaat.

Clean. Friendly service. I camped in an unpowered camp site.   There was no option to park my car beside my tent, which was inconvenient.   The kitchen area was great, and they let me use a powerpoint there so I could use my laptop.  You need to use a pass code to drive in and out, but thankfully, no codes are needed for the bathroom. There were a few families and grey nomads.  Friendly atmosphere.
Have really enjoyed a very relaxing 5 days at Blacks Beach.  Great sized and well setout park.  Super easy access to the beach.

Great park with good, clean facilities. No visitors allowed and I found this really disappointing, considering we are travelling with a baby it would have been easier for our friend to come to us. Please consider changing this in the future. |Bonus was the coffee van, she was very friendly and it was delicious! :)
Lovely lawn surrounding caravan sites and park backs right onto the beautifully wide, sandy beach. Great Mexican food van on site- delicious!

We loved our stay in our caravan at Blacks Beach caravan park. The staff were so friendly , everything was clean and well looked after. Location was great being right on the beach ,small shops within walking distance and larger shops a short drive away. Look forward to staying here again.
Peaceful beach front park, well worth the stay
VeryVery good

My partner Rob and I stayed at this caravan park and our experience here would have been a 10 star rating but as 5 stars is the maximum, we could only give 5.   We had the Glamping Tent book for 4 nights and arrived at the park a little early to check in. This is where we met the manager Andrew and he quickly explained that this wasn't a problem.   He allowed us in through the gate to park our vehicle and apologised for not having the Glamping Tent quite ready.  He said to have a coffee at the coffee van and he'd notify us when we could check in.  Within 5 minutes he came out and told us we could check in.  We both picked up on his friendly and easy going nature.  The Glamping Tent was clean and comfortable and the beach frontage was stunning.  As we were enjoying our stay at this park so much we decided to set up our own tent on a site for a further 4 nights. Andrew drove us around on his buggy showing us the sites available and recommending the best one for us.  As Andrew and Fiona, the park managers, made us feel so at home along with the cleanliness of the amenities we decided to extend our stay another 4 nights.  Due to Rob badly  tearing his calf  muscle we were considering moving in to a cabin.  The manager,  Andrew,  called past to say g'day and after we explained what had happened he put a cabin on hold until we made our decision.  10 minutes later he arrived back with a set of crutches.  Also assisted us in finding a physio.  Andrew also offered to pick Rob up in the buggy and take him to the amenities when needed.  We then  decided to move into a cabin and they immediately had that ready for us.  They also supplied a "State of Origin" night for all guest's to watch the game on the tv in the well equipped camp kitchen plus decorations and free sausage sizzle.   Andrew and Fiona went above and beyond to make us feel welcome (all guests).  After the tearing of the calf muscle injury the support and assistance from both Andrew and Fiona was outstanding.  Do yourself a favor and stay at his caravan park. We cannot recommend it highly enough.  Other guests we spoke to also didn't want to leave.  We will be back!!!

Fantastic park, good tidy amenities, nice pool area, well kept grounds, great staff and great location right on the beach, great views. We were lucky enough to see two dolphins swim by and put on a show. I would definitely stay again.
Great location, beautiful park and great customer service!

Loved this park. Amenities  were very clean and modern. Laundry was fantastic. Great friendly staff and Jac's Coffee and Taco van at the gate all make this a great place to stay. Plenty for kids to do with a beautiful pool, water park, peddle carts etc.
